description:
An older Landsat multi-spectral dataset (GeoTIFF) at /home/ga/snap_data/landsat_multispectral.tif has lost its spectral metadata. Restore the metadata for the four spectral bands (originally band_1, band_2, band_3, band_4) using the following specifications:

- Band 1: Name 'SWIR_1', Wavelength 1650.0 nm, Unit 'reflectance', No-Data Value Enabled, No-Data Value 0.0
- Band 2: Name 'NIR', Wavelength 865.0 nm, Unit 'reflectance', No-Data Value Enabled, No-Data Value 0.0
- Band 3: Name 'Red', Wavelength 655.0 nm, Unit 'reflectance', No-Data Value Enabled, No-Data Value 0.0
- Band 4: Name 'Green', Wavelength 560.0 nm, Unit 'reflectance', No-Data Value Enabled, No-Data Value 0.0

Save the enriched product in BEAM-DIMAP format to /home/ga/snap_exports/landsat_restored_metadata.dim.
